# Continuum Alternatives

Data platform for alternative investments in emerging Europe: private equity,
venture capital, private credit, and distressed/NPL situations. Profiles are
assembled from cited primary sources — registries, gazettes, courts, and press —
and every timeline fact carries its source.

## Entity profiles

- Companies (organizations): https://continuumalternatives.com/companies/{slug}
- Funds (fund vehicles): https://continuumalternatives.com/funds/{slug}
- Deals (transactions): https://continuumalternatives.com/deals/{slug}

Indexes at /companies, /funds, and /deals list every active entity with country
and tag filters. /search covers all public entities by name and alias.

## Other surfaces

- Digest archive: https://continuumalternatives.com/digest
- Sitemap: https://continuumalternatives.com/sitemap.xml

There are no public pages for people (GDPR). Amounts are shown as recorded in
sources; the platform never computes or estimates monetary figures.
